details.test: Task 1: Reserve cheapest covered RV space >=35 ft under $250 starting 2026-05-10
Task 2: Compare two units and select cheaper option with electricity when available
Task 3: Reserve two spaces at same facility within 15 miles of 85004 (multi-unit reservation)
Task 4: Book 40 ft RV under $300, prefer 12-month prepay if available
Task 5: Create account and enable credit-card autopay
Task 6: Change move-in date to 2026-07-05 and upgrade unit within $40 more/month
Task 7: Find security deposit in FAQ and submit billing question via contact form
Task 8: Choose RV space via map near exit gate and start reservation
Task 9: Add Battery Trickle Charger and Exterior Wash add-ons under $25 and verify summary
